Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format

Class CocoaSchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the concrete Schematic type produced by this format's SchematicFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
SchematicFormat<T>
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public class CocoaSchematicFormat<T extends Schematic> extends Object implements SchematicFormat<T>
The primary SchematicFormat implementation for the Cocoa Beans Schematic (CBSC) format.

File layout

   [4 bytes]  fingerprint  – ASCII "CBSC" (FINGERPRINT)
   [2 bytes]  version      – unsigned 16-bit format version (VERSION)
   [3 bytes]  header size  – unsigned 24-bit byte count of the header section that follows
   [header…]              – sequence of typed header entries (see CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers)
   [body…]                – block-data section, index section, and optional body extensions;
                            each section's absolute offset and compressed size are stored in the
                            corresponding *_INFO header entry

Header entries

Each entry begins with a 2-byte (unsigned 16-bit) tag from CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers followed by a tag-specific payload. The header section ends when all declared bytes have been consumed. Unknown tags are tolerated: their payload is read via a 3-byte length prefix and stored as a raw byte array.

Body sections

  • Block-data section – one serialised BlockData entry per distinct block type, produced by the active BlockDataEncoder. Compressed with defaultCompressionEngineForBlocks.
  • Index section – spatial index mapping world positions to block-data offsets, produced by the active IndexEncoder. Compressed with defaultCompressionEngineForIndexes.
  • Body extensions – optional named blobs attached to the schematic via BodyExtension. Each extension has its own BODY_EXTENSION header entry and is compressed independently.

Extensibility

Block-data encoders, index encoders, compression engines, and body-extension formats are all registered at construction time or via the register* / setDefault* methods, making the format fully pluggable without subclassing.

See Also:
  • BlockDataEncoder
  • IndexEncoder
  • BodyExtensionFormat

  • Field Details

    • FINGERPRINT

      public static final String FINGERPRINT
      Magic bytes at the start of every CBSC file ("CBSC").
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FINGERPRINT_SIZE

      public static final int FINGERPRINT_SIZE
      Number of bytes occupied by the fingerprint (4).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • VERSION

      public static final int VERSION
      Format version written to and expected from every CBSC file (1).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • HEADER_START_INDEX

      public static final long HEADER_START_INDEX
      Absolute byte offset in the output stream at which the header section begins. Equals FINGERPRINT_SIZE + 2 (version) + 3 (header length field) = 9L.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • CocoaSchematicFormat

      public CocoaSchematicFormat(Map<Integer,BlockDataEncoder> blockDataEncoderMap, Map<Integer,IndexEncoder> indexEncoderMap, Set<CompressionEngine> compressionEngines, byte defaultCompressionForBlock, byte defaultCompressionForIndexes, SchematicFactory<T> schematicFactory)
      Creates a new CocoaSchematicFormat with the given encoders and compression settings.

      The first entry of each encoder map is used as the preferred encoder for writing unless overridden by setPreferBlockEncoder(int, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockDataEncoder) or setPreferIndexEncoder(int, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.IndexEncoder).

      Parameters:
      blockDataEncoderMap - map from encoder ID to BlockDataEncoder
      indexEncoderMap - map from encoder ID to IndexEncoder
      compressionEngines - set of available CompressionEngine implementations
      defaultCompressionForBlock - compression-type byte used for the block-data section
      defaultCompressionForIndexes - compression-type byte used for the index section
      schematicFactory - factory used to construct Schematic instances on read

  • Method Details

    • registerBodyExtensionFormat

      public void registerBodyExtensionFormat(long id, BodyExtensionFormat<?> format)
      Registers a BodyExtensionFormat for the given extension ID.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier for the body extension
      format - format used to read and write the extension's payload

    • registerAllBodyExtensionsFormat

      public void registerAllBodyExtensionsFormat(Map<Long,BodyExtensionFormat<?>> bodyExtensionFormat)
      Registers multiple BodyExtensionFormat entries at once.
      Parameters:
      bodyExtensionFormat - map from extension ID to its format

    • registerBlockEncoder

      public void registerBlockEncoder(int id, BlockDataEncoder encoder)
      Registers a BlockDataEncoder under the given ID.

      The registered encoder can be selected during reading when a file declares this ID in its CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers.BLOCK_DATA_ENCODING header entry.

      Parameters:
      id - the numeric encoder identifier written to and read from the file header
      encoder - the encoder implementation to register

    • registerIndexEncoder

      public void registerIndexEncoder(int id, IndexEncoder encoder)
      Registers an IndexEncoder under the given ID.

      The registered encoder can be selected during reading when a file declares this ID in its CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers.INDEX_ENCODING header entry.

      Parameters:
      id - the numeric encoder identifier written to and read from the file header
      encoder - the encoder implementation to register

    • setPreferBlockEncoder

      public void setPreferBlockEncoder(int id, BlockDataEncoder encoder)
      Sets the BlockDataEncoder that will be used when writing new schematic files.

      Also registers encoder under id so it can be resolved during reads.

      Parameters:
      id - the numeric encoder identifier to write in the file header
      encoder - the preferred encoder

    • setPreferIndexEncoder

      public void setPreferIndexEncoder(int id, IndexEncoder encoder)
      Sets the IndexEncoder that will be used when writing new schematic files.

      Also registers encoder under id so it can be resolved during reads.

      Parameters:
      id - the numeric encoder identifier to write in the file header
      encoder - the preferred encoder

    • registerCompressionEngine

      public void registerCompressionEngine(byte id, CompressionEngine engine)
      Registers a CompressionEngine under the given type byte.
      Parameters:
      id - the compression-type identifier stored in CompressionBlockInfo
      engine - the engine implementation to register

    • setDefaultCompressionEngineForBlocks

      public void setDefaultCompressionEngineForBlocks(CompressionEngine engine)
      Sets the compression engine used for the block-data body section when writing.
      Parameters:
      engine - the engine to use

    • setDefaultCompressionEngineForIndexes

      public void setDefaultCompressionEngineForIndexes(CompressionEngine engine)
      Sets the compression engine used for the index body section when writing.
      Parameters:
      engine - the engine to use

    • setDefaultCompressionEngineForBodyExtensions

      public void setDefaultCompressionEngineForBodyExtensions(CompressionEngine engine)
      Sets the compression engine used for body-extension sections when writing.
      Parameters:
      engine - the engine to use

    • write

      public void write(T schematic, net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableOutputStream out)
      Serialises schematic to out in the CBSC format.

      The method writes the fingerprint and version, generates the header section (with placeholder entries for block and index compression info), encodes and compresses the block-data and index body sections, back-patches the header placeholders with the actual CompressionBlockInfo values, and finally writes any body extensions.

      Specified by:
      write in interface SchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>
      Parameters:
      schematic - the schematic to serialise
      out - the output stream to write to; must support seeking for back-patching
      Throws:
      UncheckedIOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • read

      public T read(net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream in)
      Deserialises a CBSC schematic from in and returns an instance of T.

      The method validates the fingerprint and version, parses the header section, then reads and decompresses the block-data and index body sections. Each section's integrity is verified against the stored uncompressed size and CRC-32 checksum. The index is decoded via the IndexEncoder declared in the header, which in turn uses the BlockDataEncoder to reconstruct individual block states. Body extensions are decoded last. The resulting data is passed to the configured SchematicFactory to produce the final schematic object.

      Specified by:
      read in interface SchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>
      Parameters:
      in - the seekable stream positioned at the start of the CBSC file
      Returns:
      the deserialised schematic
      Throws:
      UncheckedIOException - if any I/O, integrity, or version check fails
